channel.title: SevenAtSevenLastSection
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenLastSection, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Latine Books to Read This Spring
item.description: Add these new Latine books to your reading lists this spring, from a debut rom-com set in Venezuela and and a gothic thriller to a romantic YA ghost s...

item.title: The Bestselling Books of the Week, According to All the Lists
item.description: USA Today, Publishers Weekly, NYT, Amazon, and Indie Booksellers all have their own bestseller lists. Here are the combined results.

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for March 5, 2026
item.description: Magic, monsters, and a mysterious curse, a laugh-out-loud queer rom-com, a genre-bending novel of ghosts and hidden histories, and more of today's bes...

item.title: A Practical Guide to Getting Fit in Midlife
Savoring the Journey with Padma Lakshmi
item.description: The Emmy-nominated TV host dishes on the power of connection, food, fitness, and the art of finding joy.

item.title: Preventive Health Tests to Know After 50
Women on the Inside
item.description: News Inside Issue 22 takes a hard look at how incarcerated women face unique challenges — and why their stories deserve to be heard.

item.title: A New Dystopian Novel from the Author of The Giver—and More SFF Links
item.description: In today's round-up of recent sci-fi and fantasy links, a new Lois Lowry, recent SFF awards and honors, and more!

item.title: Why Missouri Prisons Can Be Deadly for People With Opioid Addictions
item.description: In a prison system rife with drugs, a new civil rights lawsuit accuses the Missouri DOC of punishing people for addiction, rather than treating it.

item.title: This Massive Fandom is Screaming About a Major Reveal
item.description: Sarah J. Maas reveals the release dates for the next ACOTAR books, the trailer for THE HANDMAID'S TALE sequel series, and more.

item.title: Creamy Sausage Spaghetti
item.description: If you love a creamy pasta with big flavor, this creamy sausage spaghetti needs to be on your menu. Smoked…

item.title: It’s Dangerous to Feel This Desperate: How to Ease the Chaos in New York’s Prisons
item.description: When the governor doesn’t commute sentences, and the legislature won’t act, the carrot-and-stick system of rehabilitation disintegrates.

item.title: The Harrowing Journey Home for Families Leaving Immigration Detention
item.description: Parents and children from a detention center in Texas found themselves dropped at a border town shelter with few means to leave.

item.description: The era of stable, lifelong employment has been over for a long time. Stop relying on a single employer for financial security. The traditional career...

item.title: Cart Confidential Vol. 33
item.description: End of February reflects that subtle turn toward early spring, pieces that feel fresh without getting ahead of the season.… The post Cart Confidential...

item.title: Tuscan Melting Cabbage

item.title: As Texas Restricts Cashless Bail, More People Will Be Jailed for Months Based on an Accusation
item.description: Despite evidence that cashless bail doesn’t increase crime, several states are moving to restrict it.
